title: Exposed Search
pitch: Customers who search convert at a significantly higher rate, but the default search was a small icon tucked into the header, easy to overlook entirely. This experience brings search to the forefront with a persistent, animated search bar that lives in the utility navigation on desktop, making it immediately visible and inviting.
problem: The default search was hidden behind a small icon in the header. Customers who did find and use search converted at significantly higher rates, but most never engaged with it. The opportunity was sitting there untapped.
hypothesis: Making search persistent and prominent in the navigation would increase search engagement and drive higher conversion by connecting more customers with what they're looking for, faster.
